aionima.name: Tynn
aionima.description: Tynn-the-service as a marketplace plugin. Registers a 'tynn' PmProvider (full MCP-backed PM experience replacing tynn-lite for projects that opt in) plus an MCP server template that surfaces in the per-project MCP tab. Future iteration: a Kanban MApp for visual task management. Tynn-lite stays baked-in as the file-based fallback; tynn-plugin is the upgrade path.
